\tzpentry{ID4737}{Entanglements Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4737 introduces Entanglements Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\EntanglementS = -\\sum_k \\left[ n_k \\ln n_k + (1+n_k)\\ln(1+n_k) \\right]\n\\end{equation}
